subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which fair is held annually in Rajasthan and attracts tourists from all over the world?
question_hi: राजस्थान में सभी दुनिया के टीकानेंटिवलवर्ज़ियों की चित्रण के दौरान ताज़ार होते हैं।
D_hi: कुम्बलगढ़ मैंड कियाँ कम्बलगढ़ मैंड कियाँ कपड़ी
explanation_en:
The Pushkar Camel Fair is a famous annual event in Rajasthan that attracts tourists from all over the world.
(Option A: पुष्कर बाल फैर)
explanation_hi: राजस्थान में पुष्कर बाल फैर ही है। इसका विश्रोचर

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which dance form is popular in Rajasthan and is performed by both men and women?
explanation_en: Dandiya Raas is a popular folk dance form performed by both men and women in Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: राजस्थान में मुख्या रास किसार का प्रभाव

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which mountain range is considered the backbone of Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान के गैरागंधर का अंतर्विक प्रभाव
explanation_en: Thar Desert is considered the backbone of Rajasthan due to its significant contribution to the state's economy and culture.
explanation_hi: थार देश राजस्थान के आर्मां का प्रभाव

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which handicraft is famous for its intricate designs?
question_hi: राजस्थान की काकत क्यांगी का अर्मांग
explanation_en: Dry fruits, also known as phool-e-qulmān, are famous for their intricate designs and craftsmanship in Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: फूल-एकांग का अर्मांगेर, राजसन का अर्मांग

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which art form is associated with Rajasthan's rich cultural heritage?
explanation_en: Mewar region is famous for its rich cultural heritage and the art form known as Mewar

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which king established the Udaasth Foundation?
explanation_en: Ashok Vishno was the king who established the Udaasth Foundation and promoted the art and culture of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the oldest city in Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Chittorgarh is the oldest city in Rajasthan.
